name: Stable Beluga 1 (FreeWilly 1) 65B
license: CC BY-NC-4.0 (Non-Commercial Creative Commons License) — released as delta weights over Meta's LLaMA 65B
archDisplay: LLaMA 65B dense Transformer, Orca-style supervised fine-tune
note: Ranked #4 on the HF Open LLM Leaderboard at launch (Jul 27 2023); released as delta weights over Meta's LLaMA 65B.

results.notes: HF Open LLM Leaderboard snapshot (2023-09-04) for stabilityai/StableBeluga1-Delta, MMLU 5-shot: 64.8. This replaces the previously-dropped MMLU 64.83 figure whose sourceUrl (llm.extractum.io) had gone dead; this new source is a live, fetchable archival mirror of the original leaderboard data and closely matches the earlier (unconfirmable) figure.
HF Open LLM Leaderboard snapshot (2023-09-04), ARC-Challenge 25-shot: 68.2, for stabilityai/StableBeluga1-Delta.
HF Open LLM Leaderboard snapshot (2023-09-04), HellaSwag 10-shot: 85.9.
HF Open LLM Leaderboard snapshot (2023-09-04), TruthfulQA MC 0-shot: 55.8.

HF 'open-llm-leaderboard-old' details dataset for stabilityai/StableBeluga1-Delta, harness|winogrande|5 accuracy: 0.4980268350434096 (raw JSON verified directly). Not previously tracked for this model (only mmlu/arc-challenge/hellaswag/truthfulqa were). Near-random performance (~50%) is consistent with this being an early, unaligned delta-weight LLaMA-1 65B model with the same eval-harness lineage already used to source Stable Beluga 2's winogrande/gsm8k/drop results.

HF 'open-llm-leaderboard-old' details dataset for stabilityai/StableBeluga1-Delta, harness|gsm8k|5 accuracy: 0.0, confirmed identically in both the 2023-09-24 and a later 2023-12-03 re-run (results_2023-12-03T02-37-55.294823.json), so this is a stable, reproduced result rather than a one-off fluke. Not previously tracked for this model. A score of 0 on 5-shot GSM8K is plausible for a non-math-tuned LLaMA-1 65B Orca SFT model with strict answer-format parsing in the eval harness.

HF 'open-llm-leaderboard-old' details dataset for stabilityai/StableBeluga1-Delta, harness|drop|3: em 0.0, f1 0.0 (raw JSON verified directly). Not previously tracked for this model. Mirrors the corpus's existing Stable Beluga 2 DROP entry, which likewise reports the F1 score from the same eval-harness family/source.

verificationNotes: CONFIRMED real via HF model card raw README (stabilityai/StableBeluga1-Delta) and Stability AI's blog post (published Jul 21 2023, updated Jul 28): LLaMA-65B base, Orca-style SFT, delta-weight release, ranked #4 on HF Open LLM Leaderboard as of Jul 27 2023 — matches the note. CORRECTED license: the HF README literally states 'Fine-tuned checkpoints (StableBeluga1) is licensed under the Non-Commercial Creative Commons license (CC BY-NC-4.0)' — this is NOT the 'Stable Beluga Non-Commercial Community License' (that named license applies only to Beluga 2). Context length (2048) is the standard LLaMA-1 architecture value; the HF card itself states no explicit max-sequence-length. DROPPED the sole result row (MMLU 64.83, sourceUrl llm.extractum.io): that URL fails TLS certificate validation (hostname mismatch — the domain now resolves to an unrelated site, ag3ntum.com) and no alternate source could be found confirming this exact figure, so it was removed per the no-unconfirmed-numbers rule.
